zh.lifeSummary: 當William de la Mare於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Ralph de la Mare22歲，母親Cressie de Malherbe20歲。他和Mabel Malherbe至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1216年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de la Mare于大约1150年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Ralph de la Mare22岁，母亲Cressie de Malherbe20岁。他和Mabel Malherbe至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1216年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de la Mare was born about 1150, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de la Mare, was 22 and his mother, Cressie de Malherbe, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Mabel Malherbe. He died about 1216, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de la Mare est né environ 1150, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de la Mare, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Cressie de Malherbe, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Mabel Malherbe. Il est décédé environ 1216, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de la Mare um 1150 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de la Mare 22 und seine Mutter Cressie de Malherbe 20. Er hatte mit Mabel Malherbe mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1216 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Mare è nato il circa 1150 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de la Mare, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Cressie de Malherbe, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Mabel Malherbe. Morì circa 1216, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de la Mareが約1150年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralph de la Mareは22歳，母Cressie de Malherbeは20歳であった。彼はMabel Malherbeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1216年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de la Mare(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de la Mare(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Cressie de Malherbe(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Mabel Malherbe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1216년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1150–Abt 1216: tany ho any amin'ny 1150–tany ho any amin'ny 1216

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Mare nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de la Mare, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Cressie de Malherbe, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Mabel Malherbe. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1216, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de la Mare родился около 1150 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de la Mare было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Cressie de Malherbe, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Mabel Malherbe. Он умер около 1216 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.Abt 1150–Abt 1216: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1216

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de la Mare nació aproximadamente 1150, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de la Mare, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Cressie de Malherbe, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Mabel Malherbe. Murió aproximadamente 1216, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
